title: Risk-Factor Component
description: A risk-factor component is the executable spec of one additive contributor to the SOFR path (e.g. base_sofr, tariff, sovereign, wc). It declares the formula, the inputs it consumes, the calibration shape (if any), and source citations. profile_spec_validator enforces that every formula_id referenced from a profile resolves to one of these files and that the profile's `inputs.*` keys satisfy this file's `inputs_schema`.
